From: Head of Finance
To: BI

I need our active subscriber count for the 2025 board deck — total active subscribers and
total MRR as of year-end. The platform team maintains the subscriber-reporting proc
(usp_ActiveSubscribers.sql, attached); they ran it as of 2025-12-31 and the result is in
result-2025.csv. Please put together the headline numbers and a one-line takeaway for the board.
